generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that cutting defense spending by even 5% could leave our cities vulnerable to emerging threats? While some argue for budget cuts, experts warn that underfunding our military could force allies to rely more on us in crises. Let's ensure our nation stays prepared without overburdening taxpayers. #NationalSecurity #SmartSpending
